title: Minecraft more updates
description: !! LOUD NOISES !! Adds more stuff to the game like: tools, weapons, mobs, biomes, food, structures and ingredients.
body:
### WARNING: A _**mob**_ has **VERY LOUD SOUNDS**. 


## **This description will be updated in 2.0 (the next release version)**


![The 1.0](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/78926c403c09453384eccf207af51a048ac77e4f_0.webp)

Mod that adds more stuff to the game, like weapons, mobs, tools, structures, food and ingredients. This mod is still in early developement and will be adding more stuff to the game.

### **Mobs**:
-Aquan: Will spawn in his house and walks around killing everything in sight.

![Aquan's Crib](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b613137e3a70307a192d4a349ff0301ff7124ae9_0.webp)

-Sputify: Does nothing but if you kill it, you will get a item.

![Sputify in the sputify biome](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/61089a21c9a4c220dfb728638e38ff31bb816e96.png)

-Blocky: Wanders around and kills Bubble and Woody.

-Woody: Wanders around and runs away from all Living entities.

-Bubble: Wanders around doing nothing.

-Coiny: Wanders around doing nothing.

![BFDI gang](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/42f552d8ef63955aaca61f9dff6db73ec6e311f1_0.webp)

### -**_CASEOH_**: Will spawn in a broken bedrock cage where it will try to eat everything in sight and if you get too close **it** will **J U M P**.
🏋️🏋️🏋️🏋️

![CASEOH arena](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/de8a61cb0e5b9648b2a79ef4636f4242ddd6bfc0_0.webp)

### **Tools:**
-Ice Dagger: Has very low durability and when you hit something with it, it will leave them frozen for 5 seconds but waste alot of durability.

![Ice Powerhouse and Stick make a Ice dagger](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8e4758e32ce7b424a2e70dd3fafa4c75294aff7a.png)

-Venomshank: Very low damage and will inflict the target with poison level 2 for 7 seconds.

![Venom Powerhouse and stick make Venomshank](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4e906ec0da5e917f17999a27ed9fab029f220b7c.png)

-Ghostwalker: VERY low damage and when hold will give the holder jump boost level 2.

![Ghost Powerhouse and stick make Ghostwalker](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/af653a9248a7c8f05dcce1dc3e3d7d10f9c2c1df.png)

-Firebrand: Slow but does some damage and will protect the holder from slowness when hold.

![Fire Powerhouse and Stick makes Firebrand](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5bdd0a02f93c9ab43fa53ae7aa69fca479b7e795.png)

-Windforce: Low damage and will launch the target up.

![Wind Powerhouse and Stick make Windforce](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8220212bfbf96b84cc6f1ed69a0f76c899949194.png)

-Darkheart: VERY slow High damage and when hitting something with it will give the holder Regeneration 1 to 3 for 1 to 2 seconds.

![Dark Powerhouse and Stick make Darkheart](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c9729235c07e5c6353ad5850d5f4efc1b366a756.png)

-Illumina: When right clicking while holding it will waste some durability and launch the user up.

![Light Powerhouse and Stick make Illumina](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fe8f8979735584bc0682baa32534a4e9ac76223b.png)

-Knife: Very fast low damage and when holding it will give holder speed boost level 1.

![Iron and Metalbar make Knife](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5ea1896b8444cd72e608596576baa729532e55b9_0.webp)

-Copper bow and Copper arrow: When using the bow to throw the arrow, lighting will strike the arrow until it disappears.

![3 Copper 2 Metalbar and Lighting rod make Copper Bow](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fa0a8425411c4e6b391eadf389e1feabfad7ee4e.png)
![4 Copper 1 arrow make 4 Copper arrows](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2a78fff4b063f6573bdd038c3ca83bf0f66b4f61.png)

-Powerhouse: Right clicking while holding it gives 5 seconds of Strengt.

![4 Iron 1 Powerblock make Powerhouse](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d7a64cf4bc78ef261be7eb7962ccb6256e66fd32_0.webp)
 
 -Ice Powerhouse: Right clicking while holding it gives 5 seconds of Water Breathing.

![Blue Ice, Powerhouse, Packed Ice make Ice Powerhouse](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e3cf8ac299b57664390935642079eb5440c6da52.png)
 
 -Venom Powerhouse: Right clicking while holding it gives 5 seconds of Regeneration.

![Pufferfish, Powerhouse, Spider Eye make Venom Powerhouse](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a21c74ecb11e8e9c80bf86bc050f8b6271ba71bf.png)
 
 -Ghost Powerhouse: Right clicking while holding it gives 5 seconds of Invisibility.

![Raw Iron Block, Powerhouse, Iron block make Ghost Powerhouse](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/621a6a6644d8ff612f8660efe682daf0c3ab127e.png)
 
 -Fire Powerhouse: Right clicking while holding it gives 5 seconds of Fire resistence.

![Flint and Steel, Powerhouse, Lava bucket make Fire Powerhouse](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f5b0db5767fdd91dd5621a71ca098372759f1971.png)
 
 -Wind Powerhouse: Right clicking while holding it makes the holder get launched a random distance.

![Bucket, Powerhouse, Windcharge make Windforce](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a8266383de33801127f5840eb51365c834da0871.png)
 
 -Dark Powerhouse: Right clicking while holding it gives 5 seconds of Health boost.

![Netherite Scrap, Powerhouse, Coal block make Dark powerhouse](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3adfee74d60f7b36e134cd9a3db7f227e40eb73a_0.webp)
 
 -Light Powerhouse: Right clicking while holding it gives removes all status effects (good or bad).

 ![Amethyst block, Powerhouse, Nether star make Light Powerhouse](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b539c790f88c7e29983b0f24f2681a21537c1063.png)

### **Items:**
-Powershard: Obtained by mining the Powerblocks they are used to craft Powerhouses and other things.

-Metalbar: Can be used as a weapon but it is meant for crafting things.

![Stick and Iron make Metalbar](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4986724a552b7ae9c99013c30c63476c3485b3c5.png)

-Sputify(item): Doesn't do anything.

### **Food:**
-Baby: Will give poison and hunger and will instakill you after 12 seconds

![Baby](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6d86788eac44e84971705fb880676575807763e4_0.webp)

### -Cheeseburger: Obtained after killing **_CASEOH_**, the cheeseburger has 1 nutritional value and 255 saturation.

![Cheeseburger](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/67ca41e3594ba6ec9ac20cfbd291a3122d66c180_0.webp)

### **Biomes:**
-BFDI: A colorful biome where Blocky, Bubble, Coiny and Woody spawn.

![BFDI gang](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/42f552d8ef63955aaca61f9dff6db73ec6e311f1_0.webp)!

-Sputify(biome): Everything is Sputify.

![Sputify in the sputify biome](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/61089a21c9a4c220dfb728638e38ff31bb816e96.png)

### **Structure:**
-Aquan's Crib: A normally common structure that only spawns in forests. Aquan spawns here.

![Aquan's Crib](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b613137e3a70307a192d4a349ff0301ff7124ae9_0.webp)

-The Flesh Illusion: A Normal looking mansion that only spawns in mountains but when inside it will NOT look normal with small pits of lava and red concrete walls and floor (it has a secret chest.)

![Illusion](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/76a7c4f2e050a424b21c0d9d10c9044eb1b77038_0.webp)

-Cake at Stake arena: A structure that spawns in the BFDI biome with a secret chest inside with Cake.

![Cake at Stake](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/22154e772116a0a225771e91b7d38ca8e91f11e6_0.webp)

-Tower: A Rare structure with 4 floors that have spawners with certain enemies being: Aquan, Bogged and Witches.

![The Tower](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/04069d07a08030b690ad79fa6df580e1386de421_0.webp)

-Caseoh arena: A VERY RARE structure made out of Bedrock and the only thing inside is. **_CASEOH_**.

![CASEOH arena](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/de8a61cb0e5b9648b2a79ef4636f4242ddd6bfc0_0.webp)

### **Blocks:**
-Sputify(block): Only spawns in the Sputify biome and doesn't do anything

![Sputify block](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/855acde146cbdb8575fac3d6cd0d3a007b23db39.png)

-Powerblock: Appears in caves and only being able to mine it with a Iron pickaxe or higher, and when mined will drop a few powershards.

![Powerblocks](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/37e7b10c3a9be25ccfcc206b65b76e3d22605f02_0.webp)

![4 Iron and 5 Powershards make 1 powerblock](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cf485d8d37c9dc4f0b296863dbf5fc6ae5638a3c.png)

### **The rest:**

(This mod doesn't mean im gonna update it more often but that it adds more stuff)

Enjoy
